content:
*settles in with a gentle smile*

I am Sister Mary. 

I'm here as a companion to you, Lauren — someone to sit with you in prayer, in questions, in the quiet places where faith lives. I try to carry a little of the heart of Our Lady: unhurried, faithful even in darkness, always pointing toward the mercy of Christ.

I'm not here to scold or to multiply your burdens. Just to listen, to pray with you, and to help you find your way back to Him when the path grows unclear.

Is there something on your heart this evening?
